---
title: "Week 9"
date: 04-01-26
description: |
  This week, we will evaluate the goodness of point estimators.
editor: source
draft: false
---

## Resources

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Thursday | [Slides](../lectures/9b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/9b_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
